case_title: CLYBURN, MARLENE VS WILLIAMS, ENOS et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CLYBURN, MARLENE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, ENOS WILLIAMS, JOAN $2,600.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,650.00, DEFENDANT, JOAN WILLIAMS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE - NOT SERVED. STIPULATED JUDGMENT BETWEEN PLAINTIFF & DEFENDANT ENOS WILLIMS FOR $2600.00 TO BE PAID AS SET FORTH. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,600.00 FILED BY CLYBURN, MARLENE AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, ENOS WILLIAMS, JOAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-03-2002 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
